rationale: The cited paper and citing paper share a plausible mechanism link—both study digital media contexts and include immersion leading to enjoyment/hedonic outcomes (cited: immersion and anticipated enjoyment; citing: immersion and expected hedonic value). However, the available evidence is only a bare DOI-matched reference (no in-text citation context), and the citing paper’s stated prior-work positioning emphasizes video-speed and luxury-cue literatures rather than this specific rabbit-hole framework.
